item.title: Mélanie Magnan
item.description: I have been working as an engineer with Olivier Tenaillon for around ten years. I contribute to research on Escherichia coli diversity and the identification of genetic determinants involved in microbial adaptation within an evolutionary context. This work combines microbial evolution experiments with next-generation sequencing approaches (Illumina and Nanopore technologies), in which I have specialized. I also investigate the impact of antibiotics on the gut microbiota and antibiotic resistance using an in vitro digestive tract model called MBRA system (MiniBioReactor Array).
